Room.title: Room
Room.description: A chat room hosted by a registered user.

roomId.description: The unique identifier for the room.

hostId.description: The UID of the user who created the room.

status.description: The current status of the room.

createdAt.description: The time the room was created.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A message sent within a chat room.

text.description: The content of the message. Max 200 characters.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

isRead.description: Whether the message has been read.

rooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Sub-collection of messages within a chat room.
